headline: Co-Founder at MyAdbooker

experiences.title: Head of Programmatic
experiences.description: With MyAdbooker we developed the first SSP for DOOH enabling programmatic buying in Digital Out Of Home. With this we introduced Out Of Home advertising into the online realm by connecting leading demand side platforms. Programmatic out of home has enabled advertisers to be more flexible and more innovative with campaigns, allowing them to be highly adaptive and more cost efficient. http://www.myadbooker.com

experiences.title: Project Manager / Concept developer
experiences.description: Concept development for websites and apps and online brand development. Project manager for multiple projects at Its a virus. This involved customer contact and instructing and managing the design team and the development team. Reference: Wereldhave - http://www.wereldhave.com Corporate website for Wereldhave. Fully responsive over all devices. Deukweg - http://www.deukweg.nl Tool for receiving offers for repairing minor car damage from car repair shops. (app + website) SPJ Financial & Corporate communication - http://www.spj.nl Responsive website with focus on newsroom. Walker Language Consulting - http://www.walkerlanguage.nl Multilingual, responsive website.

experiences.title: Online Marketing and Strategy
experiences.description: GearLimits provides online marketing and online strategy solutions mainly for outdoor and actionsports. In my time working with Gearlimits I was involved in setting up the online marketing strategy and implementation of advertising on the website and trough social.

experiences.company: EBIC - European Business Incubator of California
experiences.title: Media Coordinator / Europe
experiences.description: EBIC is a non-profit organization enabling California companies to enter the European market. I was involved in setting up the strategic goals for Europe and arranging our appearance at networking events.

experiences.title: Social Media
experiences.description: Maintaining online social portfolio, market research, social media strategy and implementation

experiences.title: Communications Officer
experiences.description: Main contact in China for participants at the DCC. Collecting participant information and wishes and inform relevant team members. Contacts with Chinese Media (SMG, Xinmin evening news, That’s Shanghai, Hunan TV, etc.). Inviting and informing press contacts on Marcomms for performances and exhibitions.

experiences.title: Marketing Assistant
experiences.description: Upholding relations with student associations for the benefit of recruitment. Communicating All Options brand among students, by use of advertising and sponsoring/participation in student events. Conceptualisation and realisation of overall communication strategy and marketing strategy. Internal comms. Assistant to Marketing Director.

experiences.title: Marketing Communications Intern
experiences.description: Intern at SierteeltNet during my study Marketing Communications at Gilde Opleidingen in Venlo and employee after completion of study.

experiences.title: Intern marketing
experiences.description: Intern at Fancom BV's marketing department during my study Marketing Communications at Gilde Opleidingen in Venlo.

education.description: Minor Chinese business, language and culture at Beijing University of Technology 北京工业大学

education.activities_and_societies: Activiteiten en verenigingen:2008/2009 Vice Chairman ICM Dialogue; Student organization for the benefit of ICM students. Providing social events for students, information about living and studying in Utrecht for international students and providing a link between student, education and business.

education.description: 4 year midlevel profesional education in the field of marketing communication.
Minor Chinese business, language and culture at Beijing University of Technology 北京工业大学

education.school: HU University of Applied Sciences Utrecht (Hogeschool Utrecht)
